ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for marital status */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for gender */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for education level */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for occupation */,
  "home_owner" TEXT /* Whether the customer is a home owner (Yes/No) */,
  "cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars the customer owns */,
  "commute_distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for commute distance */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for region */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for age group */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's residential address */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer was registered in the system */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer on bike purchases */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Whether the customer is part of a loyalty program (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_commute_distance_id FOREIGN KEY ("commute_distance_id") REFERENCES commute_distances ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., M, S) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., F, M) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., Bachelors, Partial College) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation (e.g., Skilled Manual, Professional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., Europe, Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the bike */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for bike type */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "purchase_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for purchase location */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the bike at the time of purchase */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the bike */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the bike (in months or years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_purchase_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_location_id") REFERENCES purchase_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_types" (
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike type */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., Road, Mountain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "purchase_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for purchase location */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of bikes purchased in a single transaction */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount spent on the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash, PayPal) */,
  "purchase_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the purchase was made (e.g., Online, In-Store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_purchase_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_location_id") REFERENCES purchase_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the bike was purchased (e.g., Europe, Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commute_distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commute distance */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Commute distance (e.g., 0-1 Miles, 5-10 Miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 20-30, 40-50) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "discount_rate" TEXT /* Discount rate offered by the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Call, Email) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
